'''√b-v-ch''' ('''kabavach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deadenylate|deadenylate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-v-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deadenylate|deadenylate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √b-v-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kabavach
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thibavach || jibavach || shibavach || kibavach
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthubavach || jujubavach || shushubavach || kukubavach
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thubavach || jubavach || shubavach || kubavach
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thubavach || jubavach || shubavach || kubavach
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thebavach || jebavach || shebavach || kebavach
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothobavach || jojobavach || shoshobavach || kokobavach
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thobavach || jobavach || shobavach || kobavach
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thobavach || jobavach || shobavach || kobavach
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || bavach || bavach || bavach || bavach
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || bavach || bavach || bavach || bavach
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || bavach || bavach || bavach || bavach
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || bavach || bavach || bavach || bavach
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæbavach || jæbavach || shæbavach || kæbavach
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathabavach || jajabavach || shashabavach || kakabavach
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thabavach || jabavach || shabavach || kabavach
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thabavach || jabavach || shabavach || kabavach
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shabavach
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshabavach
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishabavach
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shabavachnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshabavachnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishabavachnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shabavachshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshabavachnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishabavachshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shabavachro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshabavachnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishabavachro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shabavachmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshabavachnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishabavachmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shabavachsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshabavachnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishabavachsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shabavachng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshabavachnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishabavachng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shabavachya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshabavachnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishabavachya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shabavachyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshabavachnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishabavachyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shabavachnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshabavachnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishabavachnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shabavachnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshabavachnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishabavachnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shabavachnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshabavachnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishabavachnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shabavachshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshabavachnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishabavachshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shabavachshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshabavachnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishabavachshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shabavachshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshabavachnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishabavachshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shabavachronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshabavachnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishabavachronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shabavachroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshabavachnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishabavachroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shabavachromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshabavachnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishabavachromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shabavachmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshabavachnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishabavachmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shabavachmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshabavachnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishabavachmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shabavachmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshabavachnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishabavachmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
